channel.title: Aboutme on Scepter914 Website
channel.description: Recent content in Aboutme on Scepter914 Website

item.title: About me
item.description: Biography Profile Name: Satoshi Tanaka Apr. 2020 - Now, Tier IV, Inc. Autonomous Driving Perception Algorithms Engineer Twitter: @scepter914 Github: @scepter914 Blog: scepter914.github.io Work Experience Apr. 2020 - Now Tier IV, Inc. Autonomous Driving Perception Algorithms Engineer Internship Apr. 2018 - Apr. 2019, Internship at Preferred Networks, Inc. as a part-time engineer Aug. 2017 - Mar. 2018, Internship at Hitachi, Ltd as a research assistant Academic Background Master’s Degree in Information Science and Engineering, the University of Tokyo Apr.

item.title: 自己紹介
item.description: English version Biography Profile 田中 敬(たなか さとし) 2020⁄04-Now 株式会社ティアフォー Autonomous Driving Perception Algorithms Engineer Twitter: @scepter914 Github: @scepter914 Blog: scepter914.github.io Work Experience 2020⁄04-Now 株式会社ティアフォー Perception Engineer Internship 2018⁄04-2019⁄03 Preferred Networks Part-time Engineer 2017⁄08-2018⁄03 株式会社日立製作所 研究

item.title: Interest
item.description: Soccer I have played soccer for over 15 years. I play as attacker, mainly Second Top and Side Midfielder. History I like Romance of the Three Kingdoms(三国志) and the age of provincial wars in Japan(戦国時代). As a person, I like Du Yu(杜預)

item.title: 趣味
item.description: サッカー 幼稚園〜大学と長くやってるスポーツ ボランチ→トップ下→サイドハーフ→ウイング 大学のサークル HotSpurs 21期 歴史 三国志 魏推し 人物: 杜預, 曹操,
